trades.label: 2s10s Curve
trades.suggested_structure: Steepener if cheap (Z < −1.5); flattener if rich (Z > +1.5) via IEF/TLT pair
risk_notes: Duration trades amplify on CPI / payroll surprises
Liquidity node gate may block RV even when Z extreme
Quartile direction: higher_is_richer — positive Z = steep vs history

recommendation.structure: Flattener via long front / short back (IEF/TLT pair) — fade rich curve
